commitLog.message: feat: wire jobs Phase 2 — model fixes, HTTP service, pagination, bookmarks (items 7–14)
test: add tests for auth service, interceptor, and UserService

phase1.name: Pre-Phase — NestJS Migration & Backend Foundation
phase1.description: Full migration from single Express server.ts to production-grade NestJS: project structure, env validation, Prisma database, structured logging, health check, error handling, validation, CORS, rate limiting, AI endpoints hardening, Google OAuth + JWT auth, user profiles, and GCS file uploads.

steps.name: Project restructure
steps.description: Migrate from Express to NestJS module structure; set up tsconfig, eslint, nest-cli.json, main.ts, AppModule.

steps.name: Environment & config validation
steps.description: ConfigModule.forRoot() with Joi schema; configuration.ts mapping all env vars.

steps.name: Database: Prisma + PostgreSQL
steps.description: Full Prisma schema (10 models, 5 enums), PrismaService with lifecycle hooks, pg adapter, seed script.

steps.name: Structured logging
steps.description: nestjs-pino LoggerModule with pino-pretty in dev, raw JSON in production; bufferLogs in main.ts.

steps.name: Health check endpoint
steps.description: GET /health via @nestjs/terminus; required for Cloud Run health probe.

steps.name: Centralized error handler
steps.description: Global @Catch() HttpExceptionFilter returning structured JSON error responses.

steps.name: Input validation (DTOs)
steps.description: Global ValidationPipe + 5 AI DTO classes with class-validator decorators.

steps.name: CORS hardening
steps.description: app.enableCors() with origin allowlist (FRONTEND_URL + localhost).

steps.name: Rate limiting
steps.description: ThrottlerModule.forRoot() (30 req/60s global) with ThrottlerGuard as APP_GUARD.

steps.name: Apply guards to AI endpoints
steps.description: AiModule / AiController / AiService migrating 5 handlers from server.ts; AI-specific throttle (10 req/60s).

steps.name: Authentication: Google OAuth + JWT
steps.description: GoogleStrategy, JwtModule, AuthService (issue/refresh/revoke tokens), AuthController (4 endpoints).

steps.name: JWT guard
steps.description: JwtStrategy, JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard, @Roles() and @CurrentUser() decorators; guard enabled on AiController.

steps.name: User profile endpoints
steps.description: UsersModule with GET /users/me and PATCH /users/me; Prisma transaction for partial update.

steps.name: File storage: GCS pre-signed uploads
steps.description: UploadsModule with POST /uploads/presign (signed POST policy URL) and POST /uploads/:id/confirm.

phase2.name: MVP — Core Product Features
phase2.description: Full job board (CRUD, bookmarks), CV persistence, AI analytics instrumentation, and mentorship session booking. Transforms the platform from an AI-only tool into a complete career platform.

steps.name: Jobs table seed data
steps.description: createMany with skipDuplicates in existing seed script; 6 sample job entries covering all workModel and level variants.

steps.name: GET /jobs (paginated list)
steps.description: Multi-filter Prisma where (area, workModel, isPcd, keyword), pagination, $transaction([count, findMany]), confidential masking.

steps.name: GET /jobs/:id
steps.description: Single findUnique + 404 on null or ARCHIVED; same confidential masking as list.

steps.name: POST /jobs (create)
steps.description: DTO validation + prisma.job.create(); companyId injected from JWT payload via @CurrentUser().

steps.name: PUT /jobs/:id (update)
steps.description: Ownership check (404 if not found, 403 if different company) + prisma.job.update() with partial body.

steps.name: DELETE /jobs/:id (soft archive)
steps.description: Status field update to ARCHIVED; reuses ownership check pattern from update.

steps.name: Job bookmarks
steps.description: POST/DELETE /jobs/:id/save (upsert + deleteMany on savedJob), GET /users/me/saved-jobs (findMany with job + company join, confidential masking, savedAt field).

steps.name: CV persistence
steps.description: POST /users/me/cv stores JSONB content to candidateProfile; GET /users/me/cv returns it; 404 if never saved.

steps.name: AI usage analytics
steps.description: AnalyticsModule + fire-and-forget trackEvent() helper; all 5 AI endpoints record latencyMs and model after each Gemini call.

steps.name: Mentors table seed data
steps.description: createMany with skipDuplicates; 6 mentor records matching the frontend mock array in career-hub.component.ts.

steps.name: GET /mentors (list + detail)
steps.description: GET /mentors: paginated, area filter (array has), keyword search on name/title/company, isActive scope. GET /mentors/:id: 404 on inactive.

steps.name: POST /mentors/:id/sessions
steps.description: Interactive $transaction(async tx => ...) checks for existing pending session (409 Conflict if found), then creates new session; requires JWT auth.

steps.name: GET /users/me/mentoring-sessions
steps.description: findMany filtered by candidateId, ordered by createdAt desc, with mentor relation included; requires JWT auth.

phase3.name: Frontend Integration
phase3.description: Connect Angular 20 frontend to the NestJS backend, replacing all mock data and setTimeout() stubs with real API calls. Implement auth flow, protected routes, and real-time data across all feature areas.

steps.name: API client & auth interceptor
steps.description: Angular HttpClient with functional HttpInterceptorFn; injects Authorization header; concurrent 401 handling with BehaviorSubject queue; token refresh via POST /auth/refresh; infinite-loop guard on /auth/refresh path.

subTasks.name: Bearer token injection on all requests
401 detection and token refresh with retry

steps.name: Google OAuth login flow
steps.description: loginWithGoogle() redirects to GET /auth/google; AuthCallbackComponent reads accessToken+refreshToken from query params, stores to localStorage, calls getProfile(), cleans URL. hydrateFromTokens() restores session on page reload.

subTasks.name: AuthCallbackComponent reads tokens from URL params
getProfile() called after callback to fix blank avatar

steps.name: Jobs page real data
steps.description: JobService fully rewritten with loadJobs/getJob/createJob/updateJob/deleteJob over HTTP. Model aligned: id→string UUID, company→companyName nullable, postedDate→postedAt with formatRelativeDate helper, WorkModel enum bidirectional maps. Pagination signals (currentPage/totalPages), server-side pagination controls. Bookmark HTTP wiring: loadSavedJobs on init, saveJob/unsaveJob with optimistic updates.

subTasks.name: loadSavedJobs on init + saveJob/unsaveJob optimistic toggle

steps.name: User profile page
steps.description: UserService.getProfile() wired to AppComponent.ngOnInit and AuthCallbackComponent — real name/email/avatar replaces blank placeholder on every load. updateProfile() service method ready. Profile form → updateProfile() binding unconfirmed.

subTasks.name: AppComponent.ngOnInit calls getProfile() on page reload
Profile edit form wired to updateProfile()

steps.name: CV upload & persistence
steps.description: Call POST /users/me/cv on save and GET /users/me/cv on load; replace in-memory signal with API-backed persistence.

steps.name: Mentors & session booking
steps.description: Replace hardcoded mentor array with GET /mentors; replace setTimeout booking with POST /mentors/:id/sessions (409 handling); new GET /users/me/mentoring-sessions history component.

phase4.name: Production Readiness
phase4.description: Cloud Run deployment, integration and E2E testing, observability setup, and performance tuning. The platform goes live.

positiveFindings: Global ValidationPipe with whitelist + forbidNonWhitelisted rejects unknown fields
HttpExceptionFilter hides internal errors from 500 responses
ThrottlerGuard applied globally (30 req/60s) with tighter override on AI and auth endpoints (10 req/60s)
CORS locked to FRONTEND_URL + localhost allowlist
JWT access tokens expire in 1h; refresh tokens stored as bcrypt hashes
Refresh token revocation via database flag
Interactive $transaction() wraps read-then-write for duplicate session booking — no TOCTOU race condition
ConflictException (409) on duplicate pending session — prevents double-booking at the application layer
Fire-and-forget analytics never propagate errors to the request path — analytics failures are silent
Ownership check (403 ForbiddenException) on job update/archive prevents cross-company mutation
Angular auth interceptor queues concurrent 401s behind single refresh call — no duplicate refresh race
Infinite-loop guard on /auth/refresh path — revoked refresh token fails fast instead of looping
Optimistic bookmark toggle with rollback on HTTP error — UI stays consistent with server state

patterns: NestJS feature module pattern (AiModule, AuthModule, UsersModule, HealthModule, DatabaseModule, JobsModule, MentorsModule, AnalyticsModule)
JWT + refresh token rotation with bcrypt hashing
AI proxy pattern — NestJS → Gemini API
Fire-and-forget analytics via void async + .catch() chain — never blocks request path
Interactive $transaction(async tx => ...) for duplicate-safe writes (read-then-write atomicity)
Prisma array has filter for tagged/categorized resources (mentor areas)
Upsert + deleteMany toggle pattern for bookmark save/unsave
Confidential job masking — companyName/companyLogo nulled at service layer for isConfidential jobs
Angular functional HttpInterceptorFn with BehaviorSubject queue for concurrent 401 refresh
Optimistic UI updates with server rollback (savedJobIds signal toggled before HTTP, reverted on error)
Signal-based state management (Angular 20 signals) — no NgRx; service signals as single source of truth
Client-side match score computation from user skills vs job tags (computeMatchPercentage util)
Bidirectional enum mapping (WorkModel Portuguese UI ↔ backend uppercase English)

shipped: Phase 3 item 1: Angular auth interceptor — Bearer token injection, concurrent 401 queuing, refresh-then-retry, infinite-loop guard
Phase 3 item 2: Google OAuth login flow — loginWithGoogle() redirect, AuthCallbackComponent, token storage, hydrateFromTokens(), getProfile() on load
Phase 3 items 3–6: UserService with getProfile() + updateProfile(); real name/email/avatar loaded on every page reload and after OAuth callback
Phase 3 items 7–11, 13: Job model alignment — id→UUID, company→companyName nullable, postedDate→postedAt, WorkModel enum maps, matchPercentage computed client-side
Phase 3 item 11: JobService fully rewritten — loadJobs/getJob/createJob/updateJob/deleteJob over HTTP; isLoading signal; WorkModel transform in/out
Phase 3 item 12: Server-side pagination — currentPage/totalPages signals from response envelope; prev/next controls in job board template
Phase 3 item 14: Bookmark HTTP wiring — loadSavedJobs on init, saveJob/unsaveJob with optimistic toggle + server rollback; localStorage removed
129 Angular unit tests passing across 11 spec files (jest-preset-angular + jsdom)
fixed: Avatar regression after OAuth: hydrateFromTokens left blank user; fixed by getProfile() call in AppComponent.ngOnInit and AuthCallbackComponent
localStorage savedJobIds state lost on page reload — replaced with GET /users/me/saved-jobs on init
Job id type mismatch (number vs UUID string) — would have caused all /jobs/:id calls to 404
started: Phase 3 item 4 (user profile edit form → updateProfile()): service method ready, form binding pending
blockers: Phase 1 step 14 (GCS pre-signed uploads) still blocked — storage provider decision pending
Phase 3 items 5, 6 (CV persistence, mentor list + session booking) — next up, no blockers beyond sequencing
nextWeekPlanned: Phase 3 item 15: Wire CV persistence — POST /users/me/cv on save, GET /users/me/cv on load
Phase 3 items 16+17: Replace hardcoded mentor array with GET /mentors; replace setTimeout booking with POST /mentors/:id/sessions (409 handling)
Phase 3 item 18: Build session history UI — GET /users/me/mentoring-sessions component
Phase 3 item 4 completion: wire profile edit form to updateProfile()
Close open PR feat/jobs-phase2-items-7-14 and merge to main
